entity.summary: Japan-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by bitbank, inc., whose corporate lineage began on May 7, 2014 and which continues to provide yen-denominated digital-asset trading services.
entity.notes: Official company material establishes May 7, 2014 as the incorporation date. The current bitbank.cc exchange service developed later within that corporate lineage; independent market profiles may use a later exchange-establishment year.

expected.summary: Japan-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Bitbank brand.

changes.summary: Japan-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by bitbank, inc., whose corporate lineage began on May 7, 2014 and which continues to provide yen-denominated digital-asset trading services.
changes.notes: Official company material establishes May 7, 2014 as the incorporation date. The current bitbank.cc exchange service developed later within that corporate lineage; independent market profiles may use a later exchange-establishment year.

events.title: bitbank, inc. was established
events.description: The Japanese company that operates the Bitbank exchange was established on May 7, 2014.
events.notes: This corporate-establishment date is the earliest verified lineage marker; some exchange trackers use a later year for the trading service itself.

events.title: Japanese authorities issued a business-improvement order to bitbank
events.description: Japan's Financial Services Agency announced an administrative action after supervisory review identified deficiencies in bitbank's governance, customer-asset segregation, anti-money-laundering controls, and outsourced-service management.
events.notes: The action required remediation but did not establish a shutdown; Bitbank remained a registered operator and continues operating.

evidence.title: bitbank company history and establishment date
evidence.notes: Official company announcement states that bitbank was founded in May 2014 and gives May 7, 2014 as the establishment date.

evidence.title: About bitbank
evidence.notes: Independent company profile corroborates the May 7, 2014 establishment date and Japanese exchange-operator identity.

evidence.title: Administrative action against bitbank, inc.
evidence.notes: Primary regulator announcement describes the June 22, 2018 administrative action and the internal-control deficiencies identified during review.

evidence.title: Bitbank official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Bitbank identity and active exchange interface.
